results.rendered_html: āre (loc. von 1. āra) fern, fern von (mit dem abl.)  NAIGH. 3,26 . āre syāma duritasya bhūreḥ  ṚV. 3,39,8 . 1,74,1 . āre vadhethāṃ nirṛtiṃ parācaiḥ 6,74,2 . 1,172,2 . 10,102,10 . āre asmat 1,114,4 . 10 . tvadāre 2,28,6 . 29,1 . āre syāma duritādabhīke 3,39,7 . 6,47,3 .  AV. 1,25,1 . 10,4,26 . — Wie bei ārāt erklären auch hier die Scholl. öfters durch: in der Nähe.

results.rendered_html:
āre ind. Ved.
1 Far, far from, (with abl.).
2 Near.
Comp.
— agha a. Ved. having evil far removed.
— avadya a. one from whom blame is far removed.
— śatru a. one whose enemies are driven far away.
